text: SSO with Azure AD is blocking our rollout. We have 2000+ employees and manual provisioning is unsustainable. This is a deal-breaker for procurement.
Please add SCIM provisioning. We manage identities in Okta and need automatic user sync. Manual invite/revoke is a security risk and wastes IT time.
The Gantt chart is brilliant but PDF export breaks everything — layout shifts, truncated labels, wrong page breaks. Clients get unusable deliverables.
Audit logs are non-negotiable for compliance. We need who did what, when, and from where. SOC2 and ISO 27001 require full traceability.
App freezes for 15+ seconds when opening projects with 500+ tasks. Unusable for our large product backlog. Happens every time.
Notifications are overwhelming. I get 50+ per day. Need per-project granularity: mute some, urgent-only for others.
